channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: President Samia Hails DITF's Role in Boosting Tanzanian Trade and Economic Growth
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan commended the Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (DITF) for its transformative impact on Tanzania's economy over five decades, celebrating its 50th anniversary. Durin...

item.title: Fisherfolk commemorate 10th anniversary of West Philippine Sea ruling in Subic
item.description: Around 250 fisherfolk from Zambales will stage a symbolic sea action on July 5, 2026, to mark the 10th anniversary of the Philippines' 2016 arbitral victory over China's claims in the West Philippine ...

item.title: Trump Faces Criticism Over Family's Foreign Dealings and Political Scrutiny
item.description: President Donald Trump faced criticism from political analysts and commentators after the New York Post published an editorial condemning his family's alleged involvement in a billion-dollar mining de...

item.title: IPID arrests suspect in R14.9 million precious stones theft case
item.description: The Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID) has arrested a key suspect in the alleged R14.9 million precious stones theft case, marking a significant breakthrough in the investigation. The...

item.title: Coca-Cola celebrates 75 years in Nigeria with special 60cl bottles offering more value
item.description: Coca-Cola is marking its 75th anniversary in Nigeria with limited-edition 60cl anniversary bottles that provide 20% more value across several products. The campaign highlights the brand's long-standin...

item.title: Prince Harry's London Visit Excludes Meghan and Children Due to Security Concerns
item.description: Prince Harry will not be accompanied by his wife, Meghan, and their children, Archie and Lilibet, during his upcoming London visit. The decision comes after it was confirmed that the family would not ...

item.title: Yanga Secures Fifth Consecutive League Title, Cementing Dominance in Tanzanian Football
item.description: Young Africans FC (Yanga) celebrated their 32nd Mainland Premier League title with a historic parade in Dar es Salaam, marking their fifth consecutive championship. The event showcased the club's domi...

item.title: Federal Liberal Leader Criticizes One Nation's Leadership Amid Polling Shifts
item.description: Federal Liberal Leader Angus Taylor has directly criticized Pauline Hanson and her One Nation party, calling it a 'one-person show' lacking direction and team support. Speaking at a Liberal Party conv...

item.title: CDA demands forensic audit over IHC project cost overruns and mismanagement
item.description: The Capital Development Authority (CDA) has formally requested a third-party forensic audit of the Islamabad High Court's (IHC) Legal Facilitation Centre project, citing concerns over escalating costs...

item.title: KU Graduates Share Experience of Completing 4-Year Course in 7 Years
item.description: Two Kenyatta University graduates have shared their experience of taking seven years to complete a four-year Bachelor of Education Science degree. The pair, who celebrated their achievement on social ...

item.title: EFCC Recovers ₦7.2m Stolen from Judge's Account by Cybercriminals
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) chairman, Ola Olukoyede, disclosed how suspected internet fraudsters, known as 'Yahoo boys', allegedly stole over ₦7.2 million from a serving judge'...

item.title: Haryana village protests over water scarcity face government crackdown
item.description: Residents of Chanot village in Haryana's Hansi district have been protesting for access to clean drinking water since mid-May, demanding a connection to a new pipeline laid through their village. Desp...

item.title: Iran seeks extended sanctions waiver for oil sales to Japan amid shipping risks
item.description: Iran is engaging in discussions with Japanese companies to resume oil exports under a U.S. sanctions waiver, though potential buyers are requesting an extended period and assurances about maritime saf...

item.title: DOJ Faces Criticism for Failing to Translate Epstein Case Documents
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) faced backlash for its inadequate response to an injunction requiring the translation of foreign-language documents in the Jeffrey Epstein files case. Legal analys...

item.title: Jelai Andres Announces End of Marriage to Jon Gutierrez
item.description: Jelai Andres recently shared her emotional journey following the annulment of her marriage to Jon Gutierrez. In a heartfelt statement, she expressed her resilience, saying, 'Naka-survive ako,' which t...

item.title: America's Civil Wars: From Slavery to Modern Divisions
item.description: The article explores the historical trajectory of civil rights in the United States, framing its history as a series of unresolved conflicts between democracy and slavery, freedom and dictatorship. It...

item.title: Tragedy on Texas Road: Fire Claims Life in Amherstburg
item.description: A tragic fire on Texas Road in Amherstburg resulted in the death of one individual, marking a devastating incident in the area. The incident, which occurred on July 4, 2026, has prompted local authori...

item.title: Surreal Underwater Fireworks Defy Nature's Rules
item.description: The article explores the mesmerizing phenomenon of underwater fireworks, which juxtapose the impossibility of flames in water with their breathtaking visual impact. This surreal display challenges nat...

item.title: Cape Town's Civic Centre Redevelopment Proposal Seeks Public Input
item.description: Cape Town residents have until July 27, 2026, to influence the transformation of the Civic Centre parking area into a vibrant mixed-use precinct. The proposal, approved by Council for public participa...

item.title: Overview of Global Events from June 27 to July 3, 2026
item.description: This article compiles a diverse range of global events and developments spanning from June 27 to July 3, 2026. Key highlights include the Philippines' diplomatic engagement with Canada, where both nat...
